sections.kind: Added вЂ” Agregat Kependudukan format (Data Agregat Kependudukan semesteran, sheet PDDK)
items: `scripts/parse_data_induk_desa.py` вЂ” Added `agregat_kependudukan` format auto-detection for Data Agregat Kependudukan semesteran (sheet `PDDK`, title `DATA AGREGAT KEPENDUDUKAN ...`). Detects metadata from header rows (Provinsi/Kabupaten/Kecamatan/Desa), parses 14-column layout: NO, NIK, Nama, JK, Kota/TTL, Agama, Status, HubKel, PDDIK, Pekerjaan, Nama Ibu, Nama Ayah. Residence facts populated from document-level metadata. 3.833 persons parsed.
`templates/data_induk_desa.json` вЂ” Notes updated with Agregat Kependudukan format detection guidance.

sections.kind: Processed вЂ” Data Agregat Kependudukan Semester I 2013 вЂ” Desa Karangasem
items: 3.833 persons вЂ” Doc `01KSN3JYHVN61A6CJA9255HHE2`, template `data_induk_desa`.

sections.kind: Enhanced вЂ” data_induk_desa parser: Data Penduduk per-dusun format
items: `scripts/parse_data_induk_desa.py` вЂ” Added "datapenduduk" format auto-detection for per-dusun population data sheets. Detects sheets with dusun names and NIK columns (16+ digit), parses primary sheet with 19-column layout (KK, NIK, nama, SHDK, gender, POB, DOB, marital, parents, education, religion, occupation, dusun, RT/RW, zip, village, district). Handles 13-15 column variants via content heuristics.
`scripts/pipeline/row.py` вЂ” XLS bypass now runs parser subprocess before extract (cwd=SCRIPTS_DIR, -m parsers.*), producing row.json for `parsed_json_xlsx` profile.
`scripts/processors/process_data_induk_desa.py` вЂ” Fallback default fact for persons with no facts (same pattern as process_bip fix).

sections.kind: Processed вЂ” Data Penduduk 2020 Kedungcaluk (XLS)
items: 3.361 persons вЂ” Doc `01KSN0EM20WBTTG9KP2EQ3SH99`, template `data_induk_desa`.

sections.kind: Added вЂ” parse_penduduk_compress: compressed multi-sheet XLSX parser
items: `scripts/parsers/parse_penduduk_compress.py` вЂ” New bespoke parser for compressed XLSX workbooks where multiple persons are packed into single cells with `\n` separators (print-optimized layout). Handles 371-sheet workbook with per-dusun tables; supports two NIK column formats (NO+NIK alternating with local KK, and bare NIK alternating with local KK). Extracts NIK, Nama, No KK, Dusun, RW, RT, Umur, Pendidikan, Pekerjaan, Status Kawin, STA from packed cells + attribute rows. Dedup by NIK across sheets.

sections.kind: Processed вЂ” Data Penduduk Compress (XLSX)
items: 4.834 persons вЂ” Doc `01KSN22P4PTAYV30YXV504ADRN`, template `data_induk_desa`.

sections.kind: Added вЂ” kk_2018 template (Kartu Keluarga XLS)
items: `templates/kk_2018.json` вЂ” New template for Kartu Keluarga (KK) XLS documents with repeating blocks (KK header + anggota rows). Field mapping: NIKв†’national_id, NAMAв†’full_name, JKв†’gender, TMPT LAHIRв†’pob, TGL_LAHIRв†’dob, AGAMAв†’religion, STATUSв†’marital_status, PEKERJAANв†’occupation, IBUв†’mother_maiden_name, plus extra for GDR, SHDRT, PDDK, AYAH, PARAF, No.KK, Alamat.

`scripts/parsers/parse_kk_2018.py` вЂ” Bespoke parser for KK XLS format: detects KK header blocks (NO. KK, NAMA. KK, ALAMAT) then reads person rows with NO/NIK/NAMA/JK/TTL/GDR/AGAMA/STATUS/SHRDT/PDDK/PEKERJAAN/IBU/AYAH. Dedup by NIK.
`scripts/processors/process_kk_2018.py` вЂ” Batch processor for KK data, creates document + 4351 persons via BatchProcessor.

sections.kind: Processed вЂ” KK-2018 Desa Sumawe (XLS)
items: 4.351 persons вЂ” Doc `01KSMY5HKK8MP2J0HQH4SYHE3Z`, template `kk_2018`.

sections.kind: Added вЂ” bip template (Buku Induk Kependudukan XLS)
items: `templates/bip.json` вЂ” New template for Buku Induk Kependudukan (BIP) XLS documents. Mirip KK dengan kolom geser 1 (kolom 0 kosong). Field mapping: NIKв†’national_id, NAMAв†’full_name, JKв†’gender, TMPT LHRв†’pob, TGL LHRв†’dob, AGAMAв†’religion, STATUSв†’marital_status, PEKERJAANв†’occupation, NAMA IBUв†’mother_maiden_name, plus extra untuk G.DRH, HUB.KEL, PENDIDIKAN, NAMA AYAH, No.KK, Alamat, wilayah.

`scripts/parsers/parse_bip.py` вЂ” Bespoke parser for BIP XLS format: handles multi-sheet (BIP_Desa-Kel_1 + BIP_Desa-Kel_x), xlrd date cells properly, metadata rows (PROVINSI/KABUPATEN/KECAMATAN/DESA), KK header blocks dengan Excel formula.
`scripts/processors/process_bip.py` вЂ” Batch processor for BIP data, creates document + 3683 persons via BatchProcessor.

sections.kind: Added вЂ” agent intel & document summary
items: `AGENT.md` вЂ” new post-extract tasks: (1) write `doc.data.summary` (2-3 sentence document summary, redacted), (2) capture contextual intelligence into `person.data.extra[]` for each person. Extra guidance: what belongs in `extra` вЂ” any structured field adding context beyond basic identifiers.

sections.kind: Added вЂ” uraian_tugas template (Scribd)
Added вЂ” uraian_tugas template (Scribd)
items: `templates/uraian_tugas.json` вЂ” New template for employee job description documents ("Uraian Tugas Karyawan") with Nama, NIP, Jabatan, and structured duties/responsibilities/authority sections.
`scripts/parsers/parse_uraian_tugas.py` вЂ” Section-based parser for job description documents (non-tabular).
`scripts/processors/process_uraian_tugas.py` вЂ” Processor to save job description data to person records.
47 persons вЂ” Doc `01KSMVHWS12T75G8PYGRXDXJED`, template `uraian_tugas`.

`scripts/learning_util.py` вЂ” `parse_fields_to_person_record`, `validate_parse_against_contract`, `pipeline_fixture_path`.
`templates/calon_peserta_sertifikasi.json` вЂ” platform xlsx BNBA/BBPPKS; `No Peserta` в†’ extra exam; HP primer/sekunder.

sections.kind: Fixed вЂ” tabular mapping

`core/classify.py` вЂ” `get_extraction_hints` merge `field_mapping` root template.

sections.kind: Docs
items: `SCALE_UP_PLAN.md` В§2.7 вЂ” status loop penuh; `training.txt`, `AGENT.md` вЂ” wajib `learning_loop close-case` setelah training.

sections.kind: Added вЂ” agent prompts & docs aligned with postвЂ“Fase E architecture
items: `AGENT.md` вЂ” orchestrator-first policy; canonical paths (`pipeline/row.py`, `pipeline/routes.py`, `intake/queue_manager.py`); removed references to deleted `scripts/queue.py` and `pipeline_routes.py`; `queue_entries.expected`; outcomes `needs_review` + fase `photos`; `prepare-commit --commit`; platform parsing pointer; documentation map (`extract.txt`, `sequence.txt`, `training.txt`, `BATCH_RUNBOOK`, `SCALE_UP_PLAN`).
`extract.txt` вЂ” satu baris queue via `run-next` (mengganti checklist manual 6a/7a/8a).
`sequence.txt` вЂ” batch via `run-until-empty` / `worker.py`; prefilter & runbook pointers.
`training.txt` вЂ” URL manual + `row.py run --url`; parse-only iteration + sample konfirmasi; adjustment table selaras `templates/` + `test_fixtures/`.

sections.kind: Added вЂ” pipeline scale-up (sesi engineering, referensi)
items: В§3.5 Fase E2 вЂ” `migrate_fase_e2.py`; imports `core.*` di `processors/`, `parsers/platform/`, tests, `extract_tabular`, `intake/filter`.

В§3.2 platform вЂ” pilot templates: `asn_pns`, `daftar_umkm`, `data_relawan`, `anggota_komunitas`, `daftar_rt`, `pengumuman_hasil_seleksi`, `contact_person`, `dapil`; fixtures `scripts/test_fixtures/pipeline/text/by_template/`; `compare_extract_batch --per-template-fixture`.
В§1.3 вЂ” `pipeline/commit.py`; `prepare-commit --commit` dengan redaction gate.
В§1.1 / batch вЂ” `queue_entries.expected`, `queue_prefilter`, `triage_pending`, `parallel_download` + retry, `docs/BATCH_RUNBOOK.md`.
В§2.5 вЂ” `ops/pdf_fixture_report.py` (`make pdf-fixtures`).
Tests вЂ” `scripts/test_*.py` + `make test` (67 cases); bukan folder `tests/` di root.

sections.kind: Added вЂ” strict pipeline orchestrator
items: `scripts/pipeline_row.py` вЂ” linear phases (`mark_processing` в†’ вЂ¦ в†’ `cleanup`) with JSON outcomes; no manual 6a/7a branches.
`scripts/pipeline_eligibility.py` вЂ” automated retry (re-classify, multi-template assess, roster signals, parse probe).
`queue.py process-next` / `process-batch` вЂ” delegates to `pipeline_row.py`.
`AGENT.md` / `next_sequence.txt` вЂ” runbook moved to orchestrator.

sections.kind: Added вЂ” Wilayah document fallback & geo map alignment
items: `scripts/address_structured.py` вЂ” `has_complete_residence_wilayah()`, `enrich_document_wilayah()`, `infer_document_wilayah_text()`, `municipality_name_from_structured()`, `MUNICIPALITY_ADDRESS_TYPES`: infer kab/kota dari konteks dokumen hanya bila person belum punya alamat domisili lengkap.

`scripts/backfill_document_wilayah.py` вЂ” Backfill massal `--all` atau per `--doc-id`: infer wilayah dari judul/deskripsi dokumen (Sambas, Bukittinggi, IKN, dll.); lewati dokumen kementerian nasional tanpa kab/kota lokal.
AGENT.md вЂ” Section *Wilayah, structured_address, and geo map*: aturan lintas-pipeline (per-row vs document-level, geo tidak memakai `employer` saja, refresh summary setelah backfill).
`scripts/summary/geo.py` вЂ” Peta agregat membaca `structured_address` bertipe `municipality` atau `city` (selaras parser & `samples/person.json`), tidak hanya `city`.
`scripts/process_skd_sambas.py` вЂ” Entri baru + `--repair`: isi `structured_address` Kabupaten Sambas bila domisili kosong.
`scripts/process_skd_bukittinggi.py` вЂ” `enrich_document_wilayah` untuk Kota Bukittinggi pada roster tanpa alamat per baris.

`scripts/process_ikn_batch.py` вЂ” `IKN_STRUCTURED_ADDRESS` + koordinat Ibu Kota Nusantara untuk roster IKN tanpa alamat per baris.

sections.kind: Added вЂ” Generic XLSX student roster parser (Scribd UT Pokjar)
items: `scripts/parse_student_roster_xlsx.py` вЂ” Generic XLSX student roster parser: auto-detect columns by case-insensitive header (nim/nisn/nrp в†’ student_id, nama_* в†’ full_name, alamat_* в†’ address, NIK, gender, agama, pob, dob, phone, email, prodi, fakultas, angkatan); all unmapped columns в†’ extras; supports multi-sheet XLSX.
`scripts/process_student_roster.py` вЂ” Made generic: auto-detect institution/study program from persons.json extras; accepts `--title` and `--institution` CLI flags; no more hardcoded school name.
`templates/data_akademik.json` вЂ” Notes updated for generic parse_student_roster_xlsx routing.

sections.kind: Added вЂ” Singowangi population roster format support (data_induk_desa)
items: `scripts/parse_data_induk_desa.py` вЂ” Auto-detect Marawali vs Singowangi format. Singowangi: sheet "Sheet1", title row "PENDUDUK <DESA>", data starts at row 2 with fixed column mapping (NIK, KK, nama, gender, marital, POB, DOB, religion, family status, education, occupation, address, parents, kecamatan, desa).
`scripts/process_data_induk_desa.py` вЂ” Made generic: reads title/description/sheet from meta in parsed JSON instead of hardcoded Marawali values.
`templates/data_induk_desa.json` вЂ” Updated notes to mention Singowangi format auto-detection.

sections.kind: Workflow вЂ” skip download when file already provided
items: `next_manual.txt` вЂ” Step 3 now explicitly says: if file already exists in `tmp/` (provided by user), skip download and proceed to step 4.

sections.kind: Added вЂ” student roster xlsx parser (ad-hoc, not a permanent script)
items: Used inline Python (not a dedicated `parse_*.py`) to extract 221 student records from multi-sheet xlsx. Handles Google Form formula cells via `data_only=True`, variable header rows (row 1вЂ“3), datetime DOB normalization.

sections.kind: Added вЂ” script-backed parser routing (stop AGENT.md growth)
items: `scripts/pipeline_routes.py` вЂ” Resolves template в†’ `parse_*.py` / `process_*.py` from `templates/*.json` and on-disk scripts. CLI: `show`, `list`, `script`, `scripts`.
`AGENT.md` вЂ” Removed `## Critical Context` scratchpad; added Parser routing + maintenance rules (no per-template append).
`next_manual.txt` вЂ” Step 8 uses `pipeline_routes.py` instead of a growing parser bullet list; step 18 limits AGENT.md edits to generic rules.
`templates/_schema.json` вЂ” Documents optional `parser` / `processor` / `notes` fields for route discovery.
